target.notes: CrimsonDesert.exe is packed/anti-tampered (real code in runtime-decrypted .xcode/.sbss sections). Signatures MUST be captured from the LIVE process in memory via an injected ASI (see docs/capturing-signatures.md), not from the on-disk file. All entries below are UNVERIFIED PLACEHOLDERS naming functions the community is already known to hook; fill in 'pattern' after capturing and set verified=true.

entries.name: Player position write
entries.description: Code that writes the player actor's world-space coordinates (X/Y/Z) each frame.
entries.notes: PLACEHOLDER. Capture: find the player X/Y/Z floats with Cheat Engine, 'find what writes', then build a pattern at that function. Known reachable (community position/teleport mods exist).

entries.name: Player status (stamina/spirit) update
entries.description: Function that updates player stamina/spirit resources.
entries.notes: PLACEHOLDER. A community 'player status modifier' mod already targets this area.

entries.name: Camera parameters update
entries.description: Function controlling camera distance / FOV / height (target of camera-overhaul mods).
entries.notes: PLACEHOLDER. Camera-overhaul ASI mods hook distance/height/FOV/steadycam/combat-zoom — confirmed reachable.

entries.name: Hold-to-interact timer write
entries.description: Timer write for hold-to-interact prompts (target of instant-interact mods).
entries.notes: PLACEHOLDER. Note from community: the compiler emits the timer write in multiple inlined locations — expect to patch/hook more than one site.
